problem_text_cn: 3-26 一架质量$M=810\,\mathrm{kg}$的直升飞机，靠螺旋桨的转动使$S=30\,\mathrm{m}^{2}$面积内的空气以$v_{0}$速度向下运动，从而使飞机悬停在空中。已知空气密度$\rho_{0}=1.20\,\mathrm{kg/m^{3}}$，求$v_{0}$大小，并计算发动机的最小功率$P$。
problem_text_en: 3-26 A helicopter of mass $M=810\,\mathrm{kg}$ keeps hovering in the air by making the air in an area of $S=30\,\mathrm{m}^{2}$ move downward with speed $v_{0}$ through the rotation of its propeller. Given the air density $\rho_{0}=1.20\,\mathrm{kg/m^{3}}$, find the magnitude of $v_{0}$ and compute the minimum power $P$ of the engine.
problem_solution_cn:
解 方法一 螺旋桨的作用是将几乎静止的空气向下加速到$v_{0}$，$dt$时间内有$\rho_{0}Sv_{0}dt$的空气被加速到$v_{0}$，这些空气的动量增量为
$$ dp=\rho_{0}Sv_{0}^{2}dt. $$
螺旋桨提供的冲量$dI$和螺旋桨对空气的作用力$F$分别为
$$ dI=dp,\quad F=\frac{dI}{dt}=\rho_{0}Sv_{0}^{2}, $$
空气对螺旋桨的反作用力大小也为此值。为使飞机悬停在空中，要求
$$ F=Mg, $$
即得
$$ v_{0}=\sqrt{\frac{Mg}{\rho_{0}S}}=14.9\,\mathrm{m/s}. $$
$dt$时间内，质量为$\rho_{0}Sv_{0}dt$的空气获得动能
$$ dE_{k}=\frac{1}{2}(\rho_{0}Sv_{0}dt)v_{0}^{2}. $$
此动能来源于发动机作功，即得
$$ P=\frac{dE_{k}}{dt}=\frac{1}{2}\rho_{0}Sv_{0}^{3}=5.96\times 10^{4}\,\mathrm{W}. $$

方法二 利用公式$P=F\cdot v$来计算发动机功率$P$。
正在受力加速的空气，速度并非一致地为$v_{0}$，而是从零到$v_{0}$连续分布，平均速度为$v_{0}/2$。因此公式$P=Fv$中的$v$不应取为$v_{0}$，而应代之以$v_{0}/2$，即有
$$ P=F\frac{v_{0}}{2}=\frac{1}{2}\rho_{0}Sv_{0}^{3}. $$
problem_solution_en:
Solution Method 1 The propeller accelerates nearly still air to speed $v_{0}$. In time $dt$, the mass of air accelerated is $\rho_{0}Sv_{0}dt$; its momentum increment is
$$ dp=\rho_{0}Sv_{0}^{2}dt. $$
The impulse provided by the propeller, $dI$, and the force exerted by the propeller on the air, $F$, are respectively
$$ dI=dp,\quad F=\frac{dI}{dt}=\rho_{0}Sv_{0}^{2}. $$
The reaction force of the air on the propeller has the same magnitude. For the helicopter to hover, we require
$$ F=Mg, $$
hence
$$ v_{0}=\sqrt{\frac{Mg}{\rho_{0}S}}=14.9\,\mathrm{m/s}. $$
In time $dt$, the kinetic energy gained by the air of mass $\rho_{0}Sv_{0}dt$ is
$$ dE_{k}=\frac{1}{2}(\rho_{0}Sv_{0}dt)v_{0}^{2}. $$
This energy comes from the work done by the engine, so
$$ P=\frac{dE_{k}}{dt}=\frac{1}{2}\rho_{0}Sv_{0}^{3}=5.96\times 10^{4}\,\mathrm{W}. $$

Method 2 Use the formula $P=F\cdot v$ to compute the engine power.
The air being accelerated does not have a uniform speed $v_{0}$; rather, its speed is distributed continuously from 0 to $v_{0}$, with an average speed of $v_{0}/2$. Therefore, in the formula $P=Fv$, $v$ should not be taken as $v_{0}$ but as $v_{0}/2$, giving
$$ P=F\frac{v_{0}}{2}=\frac{1}{2}\rho_{0}Sv_{0}^{3}. $$
img_cn: 这张图片展示了一道物理习题，编号为3-26。题目描述一架质量M=810kg的直升飞机，依靠螺旋桨使S=30㎡面积内的空气以速度v₀向下运动，从而实现悬停。已知空气密度ρ₀=1.20 kg/m³，要求求解v₀大小并计算发动机的最小功率P。图片下半部分详细展示了解题过程，分为“方法一”和“方法二”，涉及动量增量、冲量、力、功率等物理概念的数学推导。页面左侧有页码“90”，底部有“PDG”水印。整体排版整洁，公式使用LaTeX格式。
img_en: The image shows a physics problem numbered 3-26. The problem describes a helicopter of mass M=810 kg that hovers by causing the air in an area S=30 m² to move downward with speed v₀ via the propeller. Given the air density ρ₀=1.20 kg/m³, it asks for the magnitude of v₀ and the minimum power P of the engine. The lower part of the image presents the detailed solution process, divided into "Method 1" and "Method 2," involving mathematical derivations of concepts such as momentum increment, impulse, force, and power. The page number "90" appears on the left, and a "PDG" watermark is at the bottom. The layout is neat, with formulas in LaTeX format.
